topics.name: Object Oriented Programming
topics.description: A way of organizing code that uses objects and classes to represent real-world entities and their behavior

topics.name: Classes
topics.description: A way to organize code into classes and objects

topics.name: Encapsulation
topics.description: A concept that groups data and methods together

topics.name: Inheritance
topics.description: A mechanism that enables reusability and hierarchy

topics.name: Polymorphism
topics.description: A concept that allows for flexible method implementation

topics.name: Class
topics.description: A class is a collection of objects that defines a set of attributes and methods

topics.name: Attributes
topics.description: Variables that belong to a class

topics.name: Class Attribute
topics.description: A variable shared by all instances of a class

topics.name: Instance Attribute
topics.description: A variable unique to each object created from a class

topics.name: Constructor Method
topics.description: A method that runs automatically when a new object is created

topics.name: Self
topics.description: A reference to the current object

topics.name: Objects
topics.description: An instance of a class that represents a specific implementation and holds its own data

topics.name: Object State
topics.description: The attributes of an object that reflect its properties

topics.name: Object Behavior
topics.description: The methods of an object that reflect its response to other objects

topics.name: Object Identity
topics.description: A unique name given to an object to enable interaction with other objects

topics.name: Object Instantiation
topics.description: The process of creating a new instance of a class

topics.name: Class Attributes
topics.description: Attributes that are shared by all instances of a class

topics.name: Instance Attributes
topics.description: Attributes that are unique to each instance of a class

topics.name: Object Creation
topics.description: Creating an instance of a class

topics.name: Data Abstraction
topics.description: Data Abstraction hides internal implementation details while exposing necessary functionality
